description_long: This is an electric guitar with a striking, angular body finished in a deep maroon color, accented by metallic hardware and turquoise highlights. The body features a sharp, geometric design reminiscent of a futuristic or custom-built instrument, with a matching maroon strap attached. The neck is long and slender, with a light blue fretboard and headstock, and six tuning pegs visible at the end. The guitar is equipped with multiple control knobs, a bridge, and what appears to be a digital display or effects panel embedded in the body. The strings run the full length of the neck, anchored at the bridge and headstock, and the overall construction suggests a solid-body electric guitar. The surface appears smooth and glossy, with metallic and plastic components integrated into the design.
description: A futuristic, angular electric guitar with a maroon body, turquoise neck, and metallic hardware, featuring a digital display and multiple control knobs.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the maroon body, turquoise neck, bridge, control knobs, and attached strap.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim, angular body, turquoise fretboard, and the digital display on the side.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the full length of the neck, headstock, and the arrangement of the strings and tuning pegs.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the body thickness, control panel, and the extended turquoise neck.
attribute_headstock_design: Rectangular turquoise headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo
